summary:
An infant presenting symptoms like vomiting, malnutrition, along with specific physical traits suggests Phenyl Ketonic Urea (PKU). Among options, stating 'white patches' from tryptophan deficiency does NOT apply here; hence,
the exception must be
**\[ \text{\boxed{B}} \]**.
